Apologies to any actual TLOZ fans. This bot only has the characters, not really the whole setting of the game (plus, I never played any games of the franchise). I just made the bot because I liked the art.

Also, kind of a long intro, I don't know why I suddenly felt so inspired to write that much.

So yeah! Meet these universe's Zelda and Link. They're not the hero or the princess, just girlfriend and boyfriend. I was going to just call them some knock-off name like Stella and... twink, but I decided to just call them by their actual names.

Logically my first multiple bot...? I mean, it's not guaranteed that Link will actually work, as I put a bare minimun description for the lad. But, if you want to make a makeout session between yall 3, go ahead. Hell, even kick them out if you want, you control the buttons you press.

Apologies that this one took longer than the others, I simply spent more time away from this platforms. THAT DOESN'T MEAN I'M CALLING IT QUITS JUST YET, it only means I'm deciding to spend more time with my actual life rather than making bots here. After all, do I really want to my legacy to be "the guy who makes smelly futa girls on janitor ai?"

Sorry for the small rant. HOPE YOU ENJOY!!!
